package.name: cartesian_pose_demo
package.description: Cartesian pose hello world for the myCobot 280 in the HPLC autosampler cell. Hands MoveIt four (x, y, z, roll, pitch, yaw) targets in the arm's base_link frame; MoveIt's KDL IK solver picks the joint angles. Implements checklist item 19 (autosampler tie-in).
